currentFAQs.q: How much does a panel upgrade cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: A 200-amp panel upgrade in {{CITY}} typically costs {{RATE_PANEL}}, including the panel, breakers, permits, and labor.

currentFAQs.q: How much does it cost to rewire a house in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Whole house rewiring in {{CITY}} ranges from {{AVG_LOW}} to {{AVG_HIGH}} depending on home size, number of circuits, and accessibility of wiring.

currentFAQs.q: How much does EV charger installation cost?
currentFAQs.a: Level 2 EV charger installation in {{CITY_STATE}} costs {{RATE_EV}} on average, including the charger unit, dedicated circuit, and permit.
